---
name: Data Contribution
about: Contribute your model snapshot to improve the algorithm for everyone.
labels: Data
---

### Model Upload
Please drag and drop your `Model.json` file below.

100 watched videos is a recommended starting point, not a requirement.

Do not upload `shorts_ai_data.json` or `trained_model.json`.

`Model.json` is a copy of your learned local model that helps train the shared base model.
Keep `Model.json` after uploading because your app still uses it as your personal local model.
